---
title: Dessin d'après Close
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549227/filmclose_pyzxps.jpg
description: Dessin d'après Close
categories: [fanart]
date: 2023-05-29
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549227/filmclose_pyzxps.jpg)

::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
